resources.string:
System 
device — device model, OS, hardware info 
battery — level, charging, temperature 
memory — JVM heap usage 
processes — process memory/CPU 
packages — list installed apps 
services — list system services 
features — list device features 
shell <cmd> — run a shell command 
prop <name> — read Android system property 
 
Network 
wifi — connected WiFi details 
network — connectivity status 
location — GPS coordinates 
telephony — carrier, SIM info 
 
Display & Input 
brightness — get screen brightness 
brightness_set <0-255> — set brightness 
vibrate <ms> — vibrate device 
toast <msg> — show toast message 
notify <title> <body> — show notification 
clipboard — get clipboard text 
copy <text> — set clipboard text 
 
Speech 
say <text> — speak text (TTS) 
tts_file <path> <text> — TTS to WAV file 
listen [secs] — record and transcribe 
stream_listen [secs] — streaming STT with VAD 
record [secs] — record mic to WAV 
stt [path] — transcribe a WAV file 
transcribe [path] — offline STT (SenseVoice) 
diarize [path] — speaker diarization 
speech_status — engine component status 
 
Gemma LLM 
gemma_load <path> — load .litertlm model 
gemma_generate <prompt> — generate text 
gemma_stream <prompt> — streaming generation 
gemma_unload — release model 
gemma_status — loaded model info 
gemma_cancel — cancel generation 
 
Bluetooth 
bt_status — adapter status 
bt_bonded — paired devices 
bt_connected — connected profiles 
bt_scan [secs] — classic scan 
bt_scan_ble [secs] — BLE scan 
bt_gatt <addr> — discover GATT services 
bt_gatt_read <addr> <uuid> — read characteristic 
bt_gatt_write <addr> <uuid> <hex> — write characteristic 
bt_rssi <addr> — read BLE signal strength 
 
Screen Control (requires Accessibility) 
screen_read — dump UI tree 
screen_find <text> — find element by text 
screen_click <text> — click element 
screen_tap <x> <y> — tap coordinates 
screen_type <text> — type into focused field 
screen_swipe <x1> <y1> <x2> <y2> — swipe 
screen_scroll <dir> — scroll up/down/left/right 
screen_key <key> — send key press 
screen_launch <pkg> — launch app 
screen_back / screen_home / screen_recents 
screen_screenshot <path> — capture screen 
 
Sensors 
sensors — list available sensors 
sensor_start <type> — start reading sensor 
sensor_read <type> — get current value 
sensor_stop <type> — stop sensor 
 
Files & Media 
file_read <path> — read file contents 
file_write <path> <content> — write file 
file_list <path> — list directory 
audio_info — audio routing info 
volume_get — get volume levels 
volume_set <stream> <level> — set volume 
 
BEAM 
beam_eval <expr> — evaluate Erlang expression 
beam_sync — reload modules from /sdcard/.beam-modules/ 
beam_modules — list loaded modules 
eval_run <suite> — run eval (tts/stt/gemma/system)
When off, the BEAM runs as a standalone node with no clustering.
Comma-separated or one per line. Nodes to auto-connect on boot.
Must match on all nodes in the cluster. Keep this secret.
New cookie generated — remember to save.
Saved. Restart BEAM to apply changes.
Restart BEAM from the main screen to apply changes.
Node name must be in name@host format.
Cookie is required when distributed mode is enabled.
Allows BeamApp to read screen content and perform UI actions (tap, type, swipe, navigate) for agent-driven automation.

device battery memory wifi network
sensors accel gyro light brightness
vibrate toast <msg> ping procs
notify <title> <body> packages
clipboard copy <text> prop <name>
services features shell <cmd>
say <text> listen [secs] stream_listen [secs]
record [secs] stt [path] transcribe [path]
diarize [path] speech_status
bt_status bt_bonded bt_connected
bt_scan [secs] bt_scan_ble [secs]
bt_gatt <addr> bt_gatt_read <addr> <uuid>
bt_gatt_write <addr> <uuid> <hex>
bt_gatt_notify <addr> <uuid> [secs]
bt_rssi <addr>
screen_info screen_read screen_find <text>
screen_click <text> screen_tap <x> <y>
screen_type <text> screen_swipe <coords>
screen_back screen_home screen_recents
screen_notifications screen_screenshot
screen_key <key> screen_long_click
screen_scroll <dir> screen_wait <text>
screen_launch <pkg> screen_node <id>
